how to fight with party members?[END-FE]

Party members automatically enter combat[NLINE]
when they encounter enemies. However, if[NLINE]
it's an important battle, they will ask for[NLINE]
instructions before the start.[NWIN]
If you want to issue an order during a[NLINE]
fight, press [TRIANGLE] to open up the menu[NLINE]
and [L1] and [R1] to switch to the party[NLINE]
member.[NWIN]
The orders you can give to the main[NLINE]
character are also available for party[NLINE]
members. However, orders such as Move[NLINE]
and Attack are often not available during[NLINE]
non-combat.[NWIN]
When the action is completed, the party member[NLINE]
will ask for further instructions. However,[NLINE]
if [COL01]"Post-Instruction Behaviour"[COL00] in the[NLINE]
Config Menu is set to AUTO, the character[NLINE]
will not ask for instructions again.[END-FE]
・About [COL01]"Attack"[END-FE]
・About [COL01]"Move"[END-FE]
・About [COL01]"Defend"[END-FE]
・About [COL01]"Auto"[END-FE]
・End explanation[END-FE]
If you want to instruct your party members[NLINE]
to attack a target, select [COL01]"Attack"[COL00],[NLINE]
followed by the target.[NWIN]
However, you cannot select "Attack" unless[NLINE]
your party members are aware of the enemy.[END-FE]
By choosing [COL01]"Move"[COL00] you can indicate the[NLINE]
place that you want your party members to[NLINE]
move to. You will be able to select up to[NLINE]
two waypoints. To send a character to a[NLINE]
destination without setting any waypoints,[NLINE]
press the X button twice on that destination.[NWIN]
However, you can't choose "Move" in a place[NLINE]
that is not considered dangerous, such as[NLINE]
in the city.[END-FE]
[COL01]"Defend"[COL00] instructs party members to defend.[NLINE]
They will keep defending until the battle[NLINE]
ends or you give another order.[END-FE]
[COL01]"Auto"[COL00] tells your party members to act[NLINE]
freely. Instructions previously given will[NLINE]
be canceled.[NWIN]
The behavior of party members can be set to[NLINE]
"Auto" in the [COL01]"AI Setting"[COL00] menu that[NLINE]
appears when you press [START].[END-FE]
Equipment must be equipped for each party[NLINE]
member. Be sure to check the equipment[NLINE]
of new party members.[END-FE]

Enchanted Gems are equipment distinct[NLINE]
from weapons and armor that provide[NLINE]
special abilities. Up to 2 can be equipped.[END-FE]
There are various kinds of abilities.[NLINE]
These abilities provide certain effects such[NLINE]
as increasing stats, changing resistances[NLINE]
and attributes, etc.[END-FE]
One Enchanted Gem can provide up to four[NLINE]
abilities.[END-FE]
[COL01]Ability 1[END-FE]
[COL01]Ability 2[END-FE]
[COL01]Ability 3[END-FE]
[COL01]Ability 4[END-FE]
Some abilities have their own level.[END-FE]
[COL01]Lv[END-FE]
[COL01]Lv[END-FE]
[COL01]Lv[END-FE]
The higher the level, the higher the bonus[NLINE]
that will be added to the ability's level.[END-FE]
For example, in case of "Poison Attack", the[NLINE]
chance of poisoning an opponent will become[NLINE]
higher as the level rises.[END-FE]
In addition to getting Gems from enemies,[NLINE]
you can also create new Gems by combining[NLINE]
them with each other in the [COL01]Gem Synthesis[COL00][NLINE]
Menu.[END-FE]

[COL01]Gem Synthesis[COL00]?[END-FE]

The Gem Synthesis Menu can be accessed[NLINE]
from the System Menu, which is opened by[NLINE]
pressing the [START] button.[END-FE]
[COL01]Gem Synthesis[END-FE]
[COL01]Gem Synthesis[END-FE]
[COL01]Gem Synthesis[END-FE]
There are four things you can do in[NLINE]
Gem Synthesis.[END-FE]
Combine the effects of two Enchanted Gems[NLINE]
into one.[END-FE]
Combine Enchanted Gems with the same effect[NLINE]
to increase the level of that effect.[END-FE]
Combine Gemstones to make a new[NLINE]
Enchantment Gem.[END-FE]
Combine Enchanted Gems with Gemstones to[NLINE]
obtain a random result.[END-FE]

In order to synthesize Gems, you need to[NLINE]
set the main Gem and the Gem which you[NLINE]
would like to add to it on the Synthesis[NLINE]
Board.[END-FE]
After setting the Gems, fighting repeated[NLINE]
battles will cause the Gems to synthesize.[END-FE]
[COL01]Planned Synthesis Result[END-FE]
[COL01]Planned Synthesis Result[END-FE]
[COL01]Planned Synthesis Result[END-FE]
This occurrence is called [COL01]Impact[COL00].[NLINE]
You will be notified when Impact occurs and[NLINE]
two Gems are synthesized.[END-FE]
At first, you will only be able to set[NLINE]
three pairs of Gems, but this will increase[NLINE]
as you progress through the game.[NWIN]
The order in which the Gem pairs are[NLINE]
synthesized is from top to bottom. When[NLINE]
the bottom pair has been synthesized, the[NLINE]
process will start over again from the top.[NWIN]
If there are several pairs you wish to[NLINE]
synthesize, please set them in advance.[END-FE]
By synthesizing Gems, you can combine[NLINE]
the effects of two Gems into one.[NWIN]
Choose a main Gem and then select another[NLINE]
Gem you would like to add to it.[END-FE]
[COL01]Planned Synthesis Result[END-FE]
[COL01]Planned Synthesis Result[END-FE]
[COL01]Planned Synthesis Result[END-FE]
The planned synthesis result is displayed[NLINE]
on the right side on the screen.[NWIN]
You can check the result in advance by[NLINE]
moving the cursor to it.[NWIN]
Please note that it's not possible to add[NLINE]
more than one of the same effect to the[NLINE]
main Gem.[END-FE]

[COL03]×[END-FE]
[COL03]×[END-FE]
Furthermore, if there is no change in effect[NLINE]
between the main Gem and the synthesis[NLINE]
result, the synthesis will not be performed.[END-FE]
If you are unsatisfied with the synthesis[NLINE]
result, you can dismantle the Gem back[NLINE]
into two separate ones in case you[NLINE]
possess a dismantle item.[END-FE]
If both Enchanted Gems you were to[NLINE]
synthesize have the same effect, the level[NLINE]
of that effect will increase.[END-FE]

[COL09]Gemstone[END-FE]

circumstances. However, you can create new[NLINE]

[COL01]After Synthesis[END-FE]
If two Gemstones can successfully be[NLINE]
synthesized, a "?" icon will be displayed[NLINE]
on the right. However, if you already[NLINE]

result will be displayed instead.[NWIN]

Gemstone.[END-FE]
[COL09]Gemstone[END-FE]
If you set an Enchanted Gem as the main[NLINE]
Gem and add a Gemstone to it, a random[NLINE]
result will occur. (Nothing will happen if[NLINE]
you swap the position of these two Gems).[NWIN]
A Gem's level might increase, you might[NLINE]
obtain an item, or you might obtain an[NLINE]
unforeseen effect.[NWIN]
However, the result that is most likely to[NLINE]
occur is determined by the type of Gemstone.[NLINE]
Feel free to experiment if you have an[NLINE]
excessive number of Gemstones.[END-FE]

[The Sealed Continent of "Goatland"][NLINE]
Other names include "The Sacrificed Land"[NLINE]
and "The Closed-off Continent". A[NLINE]
continent that lies across the ocean[NLINE]
and is completely surrounded by a barrier.[NLINE]
No accurate records remain of how the[NLINE]
barrier was created.[NWIN]
Legends passed down in various lands tell[NLINE]
of a world-scale battle 2,000 years ago.[NLINE]
A calamitous being was confined to the[NLINE]
continent and sealed away so that it could[NLINE]
not leave.[NWIN]
And it is said that our current peace is[NLINE]
owed to the sacrifices made by the people[NLINE]
who lived on that continent.[NWIN]
From that time onward, the continent came[NLINE]
to be called "Goatland", which is derived[NLINE]
from the tradition of "[COL01]Sacrificial Goats[COL00]".[NWIN]
Since there have been observations of[NLINE]
fluctuations in the barrier, there is a[NLINE]
possibility that it will eventually be[NLINE]
lifted.[NWIN]
If there are people living on Goatland,[NLINE]
then that means there is untapped market[NLINE]
potential for our products.[NLINE]
In that case, not only Monopolis, but[NLINE]
also enterprises around the world will be[NLINE]
aiming to get into the Goatland market.[END-FE]
[COL01][Additional Information][COL00][NLINE]
The barrier surrounding the continent[NLINE]
has finally been lifted.[NLINE]
Our company has promptly dispatched[NLINE]
an expedition team.[NLINE]
At the same time, we launched a project[NLINE]
to break into the Goatland market.[END-FE]

[Jewarl][NLINE]
In the continent's northeast lies Jewarl.[NLINE]
It's crossed by a mountain range that[NLINE]
divides it into north and south.[NWIN]
In the south of Jewarl, where Monopolis is[NLINE]
located, lie Makinus and Dastis. Its[NLINE]
governmental bodies lie in the north.[END-FE]
[Kingdom of Hingistan][NLINE]
A nation ruled by the Hingistani royal[NLINE]
family. The gap between rich and poor is[NLINE]
steep due to certain conditions from[NLINE]
which a part of the authority figures[NLINE]
derive profit. As a result, the country[NLINE]
is rampant with terrorist organizations[NLINE]
that are aiming to overthrow the[NLINE]
Hingistani royal family.[NWIN]
The Hingistani royal army cracked down on[NLINE]
terrorism and tightened its hold on the[NLINE]
country. However, this simply led to more[NLINE]
people committing terrorist acts.[NWIN]
The first prince was reported to have died[NLINE]
in battle a few days ago. Furthermore, the[NLINE]
second prince has been missing for several[NLINE]
years.[END-FE]
[Fomeros][NLINE]
Fomeros sent troops under the pretext of[NLINE]
suppressing the civil war in Hingistan[NLINE]
and protecting its citizens.[NLINE]
The Hingistani army regarded this act as[NLINE]
an invasion, and a war broke out between[NLINE]
the two countries.[NWIN]
Now Fomeros' objective has shifted to[NLINE]
liberating the citizens from the despotism[NLINE]
of the Hingistani royal family. As a[NLINE]
result, the war continues to rage on.[NWIN]
One theory is that Fomeros' true objective[NLINE]
is to steal Hingistan's mines. This seems[NLINE]
very credible when looking at the[NLINE]
positions taken up by the Fomerion army.[END-FE]

[Makinus][NLINE]
A port city located in southern Jewarl. Its[NLINE]
citizens are mostly made up of Monopolis[NLINE]
employees. The city is self-governing[NLINE]
and is under surveillance by the[NLINE]
Monopolis Guard Corps.[NWIN]
Because Makinus is an important source of[NLINE]
finances for Jewarl, its government does[NLINE]
not actively intervene in its affairs.[NWIN]
Furthermore, Makinus has become a model city[NLINE]
for Monopolis' new technology and is known[NLINE]
for being the most unpolluted city in the[NLINE]
world.[END-FE]
[Dastis][NLINE]
A provincial city situated northeast of[NLINE]
Makinus. Despite being a normal-sized[NLINE]
city, it is greatly affected by soil[NLINE]
pollution because Monopolis technology[NLINE]
has not been introduced there yet.[END-FE]
[El Hingis][NLINE]
The capital of Hingistan Kingdom. Due to its[NLINE]
position in the continent's furthest south,[NLINE]
it is difficult for other countries to[NLINE]
attack it. In addition to abundant ocean[NLINE]
resources, it is also known to export fruits[NLINE]
and vegetation unique to its subtropical[NLINE]
climate.[END-FE]
[Leystan][NLINE]
A city that lies in the northern part of[NLINE]
Hingistan. It has developed commerce with[NLINE]
Fomeros and Jewarl. Geographically[NLINE]
speaking, it acts as a strongpoint for[NLINE]
when other countries attack. However, as[NLINE]
a result of successive damage inflicted[NLINE]
by terrorists, it allowed itself to be[NLINE]
captured by the Fomerion army. The[NLINE]
damage caused by terrorists has continued[NLINE]
since then, and it seems that the[NLINE]
Fomerion army is suffering great losses.[END-FE]
[Schizarz][NLINE]
A fishing village that lies in the[NLINE]
easternmost part of Hingistan. It is[NLINE]
not a big city, but has close ties[NLINE]
with Monopolis. Boats regularly travel[NLINE]
between Schizarz and Makinus.[END-FE]
[Royferon][NLINE]
A city that lies on the eastern border of[NLINE]
Fomeros. It serves as a hub for trade[NLINE]
with Hingistan. However, because of the[NLINE]
war with Hingistan, insufficiency of[NLINE]
goods seems to be becoming a serious[NLINE]
problem.[END-FE]

[Red Wolf Unit][NLINE]
Alias of the 1st Division of the Special[NLINE]
Guard Corps. The task of the 1st Division[NLINE]
is not to perform regular duties, but to[NLINE]
proactively remove things that are[NLINE]
disadvantageous to the corporation.[NWIN]
The 1st Division goes into the field,[NLINE]
while the 2nd Division gathers intelligence[NLINE]
that will help the former. Also, members of[NLINE]
the 1st Division are allowed to wear their[NLINE]
own clothes instead of uniforms because of[NLINE]
their activities.[END-FE]
[Market Expansion Plan][NLINE]
Due to there being no hope for the current[NLINE]
market to expand, we are looking for new[NLINE]
customers on the new continent. The barrier[NLINE]
on the sealed continent of "Goatland" has[NLINE]
been weakening in recent years, and it[NLINE]
is predicted to break soon.[END-FE]
[Market Expansion Plan][NLINE]
Due to there being no hope for the current[NLINE]

[Soil Pollution Purification Plan][NLINE]
We plan to purify soil pollution caused[NLINE]
by industrial wastewater with our company[NLINE]
product Pollumine. Pollumine absorbs[NLINE]
contamination matter from the soil and[NLINE]
stores it inside its fruits. For that[NLINE]
reason, the fruits are harmful. The[NLINE]
collected fruits are safely disposed[NLINE]
of in our processing facilities.[NLINE]
Because Pollumine seeds are expensive,[NLINE]
there are quite a few cities that are[NLINE]
reluctant to introduce it.[END-FE]

[Fomeros][NLINE]
Fomeros sent troops under the pretext of[NLINE]
suppressing the civil war in Hingistan[NLINE]
and protecting its citizens.[NLINE]
The Hingistani army regarded this act[NLINE]
as an invasion, and a war broke out[NLINE]
between the two countries.[NWIN]
Now Fomeros' objective has shifted to[NLINE]
liberating the citizens from the despotism of[NLINE]
the Hingistani royal family. As a result, the war[NLINE]
continues to rage on.[NWIN]
One theory is that Fomeros' true objective[NLINE]
is to steal Hingistan's mines. This[NLINE]
seems very credible when looking at[NLINE]
the positions taken up by the Fomerion army.[END-FE]

[Makinus][NLINE]
A port city located in southern Jewarl. Its citizens[NLINE]
are mostly made up of Monopolis employees. The city is[NLINE]
self-governing and is under surveillance by the Monopolis[NLINE]
Guard Corps.[NWIN]
Because Makinus is an important source of finances for[NLINE]
Jewarl, its government does not actively[NLINE]
intervene in its affairs.[NWIN]
Furthermore, Makinus has become a model city[NLINE]
for Monopolis' new technology and is known[NLINE]
for being the most unpolluted city in the world.[END-FE]
[Dastis][NLINE]
A provincial city situated northeast of Makinus.[NLINE]
Despite being a normal-sized city,[NLINE]
it is greatly affected by soil pollution[NLINE]
because Monopolis technology has not[NLINE]
been introduced there yet.[END-FE]
[El Hingis][NLINE]
The capital of Hingistan Kingdom. Due to its[NLINE]
position in the continent's furthest south,[NLINE]
it is difficult for other countries to[NLINE]
attack it. In addition to abundant ocean[NLINE]
resources, it is also known to export fruits[NLINE]
and vegetation unique to its subtropical climate.[END-FE]
[Leystan][NLINE]
A city that lies in the northern part of Hingistan.[NLINE]
It has developed commerce with Fomeros and Jewarl.[NLINE]
Geographically speaking, it acts as a strongpoint for[NLINE]
when other countries attack. However, as a[NLINE]
result of successive damage inflicted by[NLINE]
terrorists, it allowed itself to be captured[NLINE]
by the Fomerion army. The damage caused by[NLINE]
terrorists has continued since then, and[NLINE]
it seems that the Fomerion army is suffering[NLINE]
great losses.[END-FE]
[Schizarz][NLINE]
A fishing village that lies in the easternmost[NLINE]
part of Hingistan. It is not a big city, but[NLINE]
has close ties with Monopolis.[NLINE]
Boats regularly travel between Schizarz[NLINE]
and Makinus.[END-FE]
[Royferon][NLINE]
A city that lies on the eastern border of Fomeros.[NLINE]
It serves as a hub for trade with Hingistan.[NLINE]
However, because of the war with Hingistan,[NLINE]
insufficiency of goods seems to be[NLINE]
becoming a serious problem.[END-FE]

[Red Wolf Unit][NLINE]
Alias of the 1st Division of the Special[NLINE]
Guard Corps. The task of the 1st Division[NLINE]
is not to perform regular duties, but to[NLINE]
proactively remove things that are[NLINE]
disadvantageous to the corporation.[NWIN]
The 1st Division goes into the field,[NLINE]
while the 2nd Division gathers intelligence[NLINE]
that will help the former. Also, members of the[NLINE]
1st Division are allowed to wear their own[NLINE]
clothes instead of uniforms because of their activities.[END-FE]
[Market Expansion Plan][NLINE]
Due to there being no hope for the current[NLINE]
market to expand, we are looking for new[NLINE]
customers on the new continent. The barrier[NLINE]
on the sealed continent of "Goatland" has been[NLINE]
weakening in recent years, and it[NLINE]
is predicted to break soon.[END-FE]
[Soil Pollution Purification Plan][NLINE]
We plan to purify soil pollution caused[NLINE]
by industrial wastewater with our company[NLINE]
product Pollumine. Pollumine absorbs[NLINE]
contamination matter from the soil[NLINE]
and stores it inside its fruits. For[NLINE]
that reason, the fruits are harmful. The[NLINE]
collected fruits are safely disposed[NLINE]
of in our processing facilities.[NLINE]
Because Pollumine seeds are expensive,[NLINE]
there are quite a few cities that are[NLINE]
reluctant to introduce it.[END-FE]

The Dance Contest?[END-FE]
・Receive explanation about contest[END-FE]
・Participate[END-FE]
・Cancel[END-FE]
Your Futon Dog will dance to three different[NLINE]
music pieces and aim for the highest score.[NWIN]
The music pieces will be displayed at the[NLINE]
beginning of the contest.[NWIN]
Next, set a dance to the following buttons:[NLINE]
[COL03][CIRCLE][COL00], [COL04][TRIANGLE][COL00] and [COL05]Square[COL00].[NWIN]
Because there are affinities between[NLINE]
certain dances and music pieces, please[NLINE]
take into account the music when[NLINE]
setting a dance.[NWIN]
Physical strength is needed to complete[NLINE]
a dance. Because your Futon Dog will[NLINE]
perform a dance three times, please consider[NLINE]
its physical strength when choosing[NLINE]
the dances.[NWIN]
When the competition starts, the name[NLINE]
of the piece will be displayed, and the[NLINE]
music will begin. Make sure to press one[NLINE]
of the three earlier mentioned buttons[NLINE]
within two seconds to let your Futon[NLINE]
Dog know which dance it should do.[NWIN]
If you fail to press one of these[NLINE]
buttons within two seconds, your Futon[NLINE]
Dog won't be allowed to perform its[NLINE]
dance that turn.[NWIN]
After that, choose the dance that best matches[NLINE]
the music that is playing by pressing one of the[NLINE]
three buttons, and aim for the highest score.[NWIN]
You can only use each button once,[NLINE]
so keep this in mind when the second[NLINE]
and third music pieces are playing.[NWIN]
The time it takes to press a button also[NLINE]
affects the score, so remember to press[NLINE]
a button as soon as you recognize the[NLINE]
music.[NWIN]
Your final score is a combination[NLINE]
of the points you earned with each[NLINE]
of the three dances, and will be[NLINE]
compared to that of the other Futon Dogs.[END-FE]

The Slime Binge-eating Contest?[END-FE]
・Receive explanation about contest[END-FE]

The Futon Dog who eats the most Slimes[NLINE]
within the time limit is the winner.[NWIN]
When a Futon Dog stands in front of[NLINE]
a slime, it eats at a constant speed.[NWIN]
An icon will appear when you stand to[NLINE]
the left or right of the Futon Dog.[NWIN]
If you press [COL03][CIRCLE][COL00] during[NLINE]
that time, you can support your Futon Dog.[NLINE]
In response to this, the rate at which your[NLINE]
Futon Dog eats Slimes will increase.[NWIN]
Your Futon Dog will have eaten one[NLINE]
Slime once the gauge in the upper right[NLINE]
is filled. Please use this as a guide.[NWIN]
After facing the Slime for a while,[NLINE]
the Futon Dog will become unwilling[NLINE]
to eat it and will run away.[NWIN]
Please fetch back your Futon Dog[NLINE]
when that happens. If you approach[NLINE]
the runaway Futon Dog and encourage[NLINE]
it, it will return to the competition.[NWIN]
Please make your Futon Dog eat as many[NLINE]
Slimes as possible.[END-FE]

of two parts: Alertness Check and[NLINE]
Determine Attack Location.[NWIN]
Alertness Check will tell you[NLINE]
on which side your opponent is[NLINE]
alert and on which side he is less[NLINE]
alert.[NWIN]
The higher the Smell stat and Loyalty[NLINE]
of your Futon Dog, the more likely it[NLINE]
is to find a weakpoint in its opponent's[NLINE]
defense.[NWIN]
During Determine Attack Location, you[NLINE]
will decide from which side your Futon Dog[NLINE]
will attack its opponent.[NWIN]
The higher your Futon Dog's overall[NLINE]
stats, the higher the chance it will[NLINE]
land a critical hit.[NWIN]
You can further improve the chance to find[NLINE]
a weakspot or land a critical hit by making[NLINE]
use of boosts.[NWIN]
During the defense turn, your Futon Dog[NLINE]
will defend against its opponent's attacks.[NWIN]
Likewise, you can make use of boosts to[NLINE]
raise the chance of a successful defense.[NWIN]
The number of boosts is limited and will[NLINE]
increase or decrease depending on your[NLINE]
Futon Dog's stats.[NWIN]

lower your opponent's HP, and make[NLINE]
